instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new NotificationSummary API to show grouped notifications.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 StageManager API to arrange three apps side by side.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new QuickActions API to add a custom action to Finder.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 Mindfulness API to display a meditation timer.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new GameCenterFriends API to show online friends.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new HandTracking API to show hand pose data.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published Bool property to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Double property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Ints to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Bool values to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Int property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a weather condition, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite podcast, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a disk space value, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a mindfulness streak, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite playlist, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a hand pose name, configurable via AppIntent.
Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppShortcuts API to add a custom shortcut.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 SplitView API to create a two-column layout.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new NotificationBanner API to show a banner.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 SleepTracking API to display sleep quality.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new RemoteControl API to show remote status.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new EyeTracking API to show gaze coordinates.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of structs with a Bool property to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a String property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Double values to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Strings to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Double property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite sport, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite city, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a RAM usage percentage, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a heart rate zone, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite genre, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a detected scene name, configurable via AppIntent.
